description: Time-limited promotional offer featuring a specific discount or bundle deal valid for one week, with clear pricing and product details in Arabic.
structural_recipe: Post a carousel or single image showcasing the weekly deal with: (1) product image/visual, (2) Arabic caption stating 'عرض هذا الاسبوع' (This week's offer), (3) specific discount structure (e.g., buy one get one free), (4) exact SAR pricing for all relevant sizes/packages, (5) validity dates clearly stated. Use branded hashtags and include product name/category. Format as direct, benefit-driven copy with pricing hierarchy.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers actively seek weekly promotions and expect clear, transparent pricing in local currency. Time-bound offers create urgency and drive foot traffic. Specific SAR prices build trust and reduce purchase friction. Arabic-language promotion signals local relevance and authenticity.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be in SAR and clearly visible to avoid confusion or backlash
Validity dates must be explicitly stated to maintain brand trust
Discount structure must comply with local advertising regulations
Timing should align with Saudi shopping patterns (weekends, paydays)
cultural_constraints: Must use formal Arabic or MSA; dialectal Arabic may reduce perceived professionalism
Pricing transparency is culturally valued; hidden fees or unclear terms reduce credibility
